backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages Python lessons and user progress, pre-populating 8 lessons and exposing query/update methods to list lessons, fetch by ID, add lessons, mark complete, and retrieve per-user progress.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (lesson browser, lesson detail view, dark theme, logo) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to one-sentence descriptions summarizing each file's role in the PyLearn Studio app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component rendering the sticky header with logo and progress, a difficulty filter bar, a responsive lesson card grid with skeleton loading, and a lesson detail modal on card click.
Reusable badge component that renders a color-coded pill label (green/amber/red) for Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced difficulty levels.
frontend/src/components/LessonCard.tsx: Clickable card component displaying a topic emoji, lesson title, description excerpt, difficulty badge, and a completion checkmark icon with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/LessonDetail.tsx: Modal dialog showing full lesson description, syntax-highlighted code with copy-to-clipboard, and a Mark as Complete button with loading state; closes on Escape or backdrop click.
A React component that tokenizes and syntax-highlights Python code line-by-line, rendering keywords, builtins, strings, comments, numbers, decorators, and operators with distinct CSS classes in a table with line numbers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads, and exposing login status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for listing all lessons, fetching user progress, and marking a lesson complete by calling the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures a permanent dark code-editor theme via CSS custom properties (oklch colors), and defines utility component classes like code-block, glow effects, and lesson-card hover transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, oklch-based semantic color tokens (primary, muted, code, difficulty levels), and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the app's summary, architectural notes, completed features, and pending feature requests for a Python learning app built with React and Motoko on the ICP platform.
